mapper.insert: INSERT INTO idempotent_record(idempotent_key, status, expire_time, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES (#{idempotentKey}, 'PROCESSING', #{expireTime}, NOW(), NOW(), 0) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE status = IF(expire_time < NOW(), 'PROCESSING', status), expire_time = IF(expire_time < NOW(), VALUES(expire_time), expire_time), update_time = IF(expire_time < NOW(), NOW(), update_time)
mapper.update: UPDATE idempotent_record SET status = 'SUCCESS', expire_time = DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 DAY), update_time = NOW() WHERE idempotent_key = #{idempotentKey} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT status FROM idempotent_record WHERE idempotent_key = #{idempotentKey} AND deleted = 0
